name: pi-safety-destructive-commands
description: Intercepts dangerous bash commands (dd, mkfs, rm -rf /, fork bombs, iptables flush, shutdown…) and hard-blocks or prompts for confirmation before execution.

metadata.description: Intercepts dangerous bash commands (dd, mkfs, rm -rf /, fork bombs, iptables flush, shutdown…) and hard-blocks or prompts for confirmation before execution.
